title: malvastrum pringlei
intro: Malvastrum pringlei is a type of flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Malvastrum pringlei include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and reduce stress. Malvastrum pringlei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in salves and creams to take advantage of its topical benefits.
